title: $urandom seeding
body:
I have testbenches set up with multiple test cases, where I want to be able to provide a seed to each testcase such that $urandom generates its random numbers based off of that seed. I have a methodology working in Synopsys VCS that is essentially the following:

input: seed

integer dummy_rand = $urandom(seed);

(use $urandom as many times to generate the same sequence of random numbers for a given seed).

However, when running the same testbench in Verilator, this seeding on the dummy_rand line is ignored and different sequences of random numbers are generated anyway. I was hoping someone may be able to provide insight on how to accomplish the behavior I am seeing in VCS (the intended behavior from the start) with Verilator. Thanks.
